NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​MessageNotificationWindow
Window
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​MessageNotificationWindow

Interaction logic for MessageNotificationWindow.xaml.  Window that shows a single message to the user (usually an error) regarding a software update.

Functions

Construct the notification window for the message notification with the default .

viewModel,
Bitmap?

Parameters

MessageNotificationWindowViewModel

view model that has info on the message to show to the user

Bitmap?

Bitmap to use for the app's icon/graphic. Not currently used.

CloseMessage

Close the message window
